#+TITLE: Footnote Test
#+AUTHOR: Test Writer

* Characters
|-------+--------------|
| ALICE | A local girl |
| BOB   | A visitor    |
|-------+--------------|

* ACT I
** Scene 1: The Kitchen
*** A small kitchen. Evening.
**** ALICE
Put it in the press[fn:press] over there.
**** BOB
The what?
**** ALICE
The press. And grab the post[fn:post] while you are at it.
**** BOB
You are acting thick[fn:thick].

[fn:press] A press is a type of cupboard or closet, often built into the wall.
[fn:post] Post is a term used in Ireland to refer to mail or letters.
[fn:thick] In this context, acting thick means acting stupid or not understanding something.
